description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Brash shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in white with an upraised heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic leather upper with perforations at the midfoot with branding embroideredWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)EVA midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves all over the outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
